summary: Deterministic validation identified #87312 and #87344 as security-sensitive, so both exact hydrated refs are quarantined with route_security. Because the planned repair work depends on the quarantined issue/PR decision, the prior executable fix lane is downgraded to a cluster-scoped needs_human action and no fix artifact is emitted.

actions.reason: Route the exact issue ref to central OpenClaw security handling and do not mutate it through ProjectClownfish automation.
Route the exact PR ref to central OpenClaw security handling and do not mutate, repair, merge, or close it through ProjectClownfish automation.
The executable fix decision now depends on central security triage for the quarantined issue and PR, so ProjectClownfish should stop before repair work.

needs_human: Central OpenClaw security triage must decide whether #87312/#87344 may return to ordinary ProjectClownfish repair handling.
